initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT
  store.s_store_id,
  item.i_category,
  SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM
  store_sales
  JOIN store ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
  JOIN item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
  JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE
  date_dim.d_date >= '2000-08-23'
  AND date_dim.d_date <= '2000-09-22'
GROUP BY
  store.s_store_id,
  item.i_category
ORDER BY
  total_sales DESC
LIMIT 100

SELECT
    store.s_store_id,
    item.i_category,
    SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM
    store_sales
    JOIN store ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
    JOIN item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE
    date_dim.d_date >= '2000-08-23'
    AND date_dim.d_date <= '2000-09-22'
GROUP BY
    store.s_store_id,
    item.i_category
ORDER BY
    SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price) DESC
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
    s.s_store_id,
    i.i_category,
    SUM(ss.ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
    store_sales ss
JOIN 
    store s ON ss.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
JOIN 
    item i ON ss.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
JOIN 
    date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d.d_date >= '2000-08-23'
    AND d.d_date <= '2000-09-22'
GROUP BY 
    s.s_store_id,
    i.i_category
ORDER BY 
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 100
